name: Klotho
summary: Aging-associated hormone/protein pathway tracked for aged-rhesus cognition, emerging human plasmid gene-therapy registries, and systemic-signal reset plausibility.
mechanism_summary: Klotho is tracked as a systemic hormone/protein signal with nonhuman-primate cognition evidence and recruiting human plasmid gene-therapy programs measuring circulating klotho, phosphate-axis biomarkers, safety, cognitive, and epigenetic-age endpoints.

open_questions: Whether klotho protein or gene-delivery approaches can safely raise target exposure in humans
Whether cognitive, epigenetic-age, or quality-of-life endpoints improve in controlled human studies
Whether phosphate, renal, platelet, inflammatory, or gene-therapy safety constraints dominate aging-directed use
